title: Handover of renovated classrooms and donation of equipment to Kuramo College
description: During the handover of renovated classrooms and donation of equipment to Kuramo College, Victoria Island; Victoria Island Secondary School, and Girls Secondary School, Obalende in Lagos on Thursday, N
html: During the handover of renovated classrooms and donation of equipment to Kuramo College, Victoria Island; Victoria Island Secondary School, and Girls Secondary School, Obalende in Lagos on Thursday, November 2, 2023.
